description: Per-position shadow-buy memo registry. Each ticker has a memo at memos/{ticker}.md. Source 'external' = analyst-pasted (auto-refresh will NOT overwrite). Source 'auto' = generated by shadow_buy_memo_engine.py (refreshed daily by orchestrator step 6.5).

No-chase ¥1,813 (WAC +15%). Q1 FY27 earnings Aug = primary tripwire. Strategic source FWD (PE 28.5x → 22x FY27 → 18x FY28).
